observations.text: Boundary logic correct: weight < 10 makes 10 fall to heavy, weight < 50 makes 50 fall to freight
All 5 ACs explicitly mapped to named tests with clear status
Additional boundary tests (9.99, 49.99, 1000, negative) beyond minimum requirements

## Implementation Summary

**`what_was_built`:** A pure TypeScript function `classifyWeight(weight: number): WeightClass` that classifies a parcel weight into one of three brackets — `"standard"`, `"heavy"`, or `"freight"` — with input validation throwing on invalid weights.

**`approach`:** Single-responsibility pure function with no side effects or external dependencies. Guard clause at top handles all invalid input (≤ 0 or > 1000); bracke
